snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-59245: Apache Airflow FAB provider: FAB auth manage"; content:"CVE-2026-59245"; nocase; sid:5462269; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-58065: Apache Airflow Git provider: Git provider ho"; content:"CVE-2026-58065"; nocase; sid:2995589; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-61505 - Rejetto HFS < 3.2.1 Limited File Disclosure"; content:"CVE-2026-61505"; nocase; sid:4393701; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-61504 - Rejetto HFS < 3.2.1 Stored XSS via File Nam"; content:"CVE-2026-61504"; nocase; sid:5448149; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2026-61463 - Shiori Authenticated Privilege Escalation v"; content:"CVE-2026-61463"; nocase; sid:4676185; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 74 threat advisories. Of these, 3 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 33 as HIGH risk. 1 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-INGEST. The overall threat posture requires heightened vigilance with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
